items.question: When and how will I receive the results?
items.answer: Informational analysis: 1 to 5 business days depending on plan (Standard/Fast/Express). Results are provided as an Expert Report. Forensic expertise: 5–10 business days, submitted to court.

items.question: Can the test be done without the second party's knowledge?
items.answer: Informational analysis can be done with any samples (hair, saliva, etc.). Forensic expertise requires official consent of all parties or a court order.

items.question: How does a home visit work?
items.answer: You book, agree on a time and address. The specialist arrives with all necessary equipment and collects samples in 10–15 minutes.

items.question: What is the accuracy of the analysis?
items.answer: Paternity accuracy is 99.9999% for a positive result. For a negative result — exclusion is 100%.

items.question: Who pays for the forensic expertise?
items.answer: According to Art. 110, Para. 4 of the CPC RK: the party who filed the motion pays. If both parties filed — costs are split equally.

items.question: Is my data confidential?
items.answer: Yes. Results are issued only to the client. We do not share personal data with third parties.

media.heading: Our Experts in the Media

steps.title: Book
steps.description: Call or write to us — we'll arrange a convenient time and format (lab visit or home visit).

steps.title: Get a Kit
steps.description: We'll provide sterile swabs and instructions. For home visits, the specialist brings everything.

steps.title: Take a Swab
steps.description: Gently swab the inner cheek 10–15 times. Do not eat for 1 hour before collection.

steps.title: Pack the Sample
steps.description: Let the swab dry 5–10 minutes, place in envelope or kit bag. Label with participant's name.

steps.title: Deliver to Lab
steps.description: Bring in person, send by courier, or leave with the specialist during a home visit. Results from 1 day.

geography.heading: MGE DNA in Every Region of Kazakhstan
geography.subheading: Our sample collection points are located in all major cities across the country
geography.description: No need to travel to the capital — just contact us and we'll direct you to the nearest lab in your city. We operate across Kazakhstan: from Atyrau to Ust-Kamenogorsk.
